finding: Browser render progress and browser output routing are separate evidence axes. Neither browser-confirmed routing nor render advance proves physical speaker emission or listener perception.

runtime_surface.hard_limit: physicalOutputProven is always false because browser APIs cannot establish acoustic emission or listener perception

verification.method: isolated Node execution of byte-equivalent classifier assertions
verification.deployment_reason: Vercel build-rate-limit status on commit b627c11b4124a39e4979ce52d45039f33991a2d4

privacy: No private chat, health data, credentials, device identifiers, payment logic, or conversion logic were added.
